title: 2D Artist
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a versatile 2D Artist to join our small indie team (8–10 people) developing a new RPG title for PC (Steam). As one of the core members of the art team, you’ll be involved in every stage of visual development — from early concepts to polished in-game assets. Our art direction leans toward dark but colorful, aiming for a polished and AI-assisted production pipeline that balances human creativity and smart automation.

This role is ideal for someone who’s both art-driven and tech-curious, able to blend classic design skill with new AIGC tools.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design original characters, items, and symbols that define the game’s world and tone.
  • Develop UI assets, icons, and interface elements that feel cohesive and readable in-game.
  • Produce character animations (idle, cast, damage, death, etc.), plus skill effects, particles, and UI motion.
  • Use AIGC tools such as Midjourney, Leonardo, or ComfyUI to generate concept ideas, iterate faster, and improve efficiency while maintaining strong artistic judgment.
  • Collaborate closely with programmers and designers to ensure smooth integration of assets into Unity.
  • Contribute ideas for visual polish, shaders, and effects that enhance gameplay feedback.

Requirements

  • Proficient in Adobe Photoshop.
  • Strong fundamentals in character design, lighting, and color composition.
  • Open-minded toward AI-assisted workflows; familiar with Midjourney or similar AIGC tools.
  • Understanding of Spine or willingness to learn 2D skeletal animation pipelines.
  • Comfortable working closely with technical teams and discussing Unity, rendering, or shader details.
  • Excellent communication skills and a proactive attitude.
  • Genuine curiosity and passion for both playing and creating RPGs.
  • Able to work full-time on-site in Singapore.

Nice to Have

  • Experience in indie or Steam game production.
  • Previous work on RPG or fantasy titles.
  • Familiarity with AI image-to-paint workflows or post-processing techniques.
  • Understanding of UI/UX flow and readability in gameplay contexts.

Direct gaming industry experience is not required. We welcome candidates from varied creative backgrounds who are dedicated to crafting visually stunning and joyful experiences for players worldwide.

If you excel at creating outstanding digital art, we encourage you to apply! We place a high value on exceptional digital artistry, demonstrated technical potential, creativity, and cultural awareness. We believe your skills are the key to bringing amazing new worlds to life.

Application

Please submit:

  • A portfolio link showcasing your most relevant works (character, UI, animation).
  • Your resume/CV.

*Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete an art test as part of the selection process.*

postedCompany.description:
At Vertex Games, our goal is to bring the best in mobile gaming directly to your fingertips. We believe that everyone should have access to quality, entertaining experiences, no matter where they are or what they’re doing. That’s why we’ve dedicated ourselves to make the finest games available on mobile devices.


As a global leader in the casual gaming industry, we are excited to open our new office in Singapore. Our brand is synonymous with engaging, accessible games enjoyed worldwide. Our expansion into Singapore aligns with our ongoing commitment to delivering quality and innovation in the gaming world.
postedCompany.name: VERTEX GAMES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
